item.title: Unlock Your Profitable Niche 🎯 • Identify your transferable skills and interests. • Research market demand and competition. • Align skills with profitable industries. • Use: “I leveraged my skills in X to solve Y problem.” • Test your niche with small projects or freelance work. What skills can you pivot into a profitable niche today? #career #skills #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Unlock Your Profitable Niche 🎯 • Identify your transferable skills and interests. • Research market demand and competition. • Align skills with profitable industries. • Use: “I leveraged my skills in X to solve Y problem.” • Test your niche with small projects or freelance work. What skills can you pivot into a profitable niche today? #career #skills #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
